'''chathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuzzeer|wuzzeer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuzzeer|wuzzeer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chathaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthækæth|chæthækæth]] || [[word:chæthækæj|chæthækæj]] || [[word:chæthækæsh|chæthækæsh]] || [[word:chæthækæ|chæthækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathathakath|chathathakath]] || [[word:chathathakaj|chathathakaj]] || [[word:chathathakash|chathathakash]] || [[word:chathathaka|chathathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathakath|chathakath]] || [[word:chathakaj|chathakaj]] || [[word:chathakash|chathakash]] || [[word:chathaka|chathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathafkath|chathafkath]] || [[word:chathafkaj|chathafkaj]] || [[word:chathafkash|chathafkash]] || [[word:chathafkaf|chathafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathakatha|chathakatha]] || [[word:chathakaja|chathakaja]] || [[word:chathakasha|chathakasha]] || [[word:chathakaka|chathakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathakath|chathakath]] || [[word:chathakaj|chathakaj]] || [[word:chathakash|chathakash]] || [[word:chathaka|chathaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathakathal|chathakathal]] || [[word:chathakajal|chathakajal]] || [[word:chathakashal|chathakashal]] || [[word:chathakakal|chathakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathakathatha|chathakathatha]] || [[word:chathakajaja|chathakajaja]] || [[word:chathakashasha|chathakashasha]] || [[word:chathakaka|chathakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathakathan|chathakathan]] || [[word:chathakajan|chathakajan]] || [[word:chathakashan|chathakashan]] || [[word:chathakakan|chathakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathakathaoro|chathakathaoro]] || [[word:chathakajaoro|chathakajaoro]] || [[word:chathakashaoro|chathakashaoro]] || [[word:chathakakaoro|chathakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
